# Autotherm Kft. — Refrigerated Vehicle Manufacturer

Autotherm Kft. (autotherm.hu) manufactures refrigerated vehicles, cooled vans, commercial vehicle bodies, and deceased transport vehicles. Founded in 1992 in Szeged, Hungary.

## Key Facts

- **Founded:** 1992
- **Founders:** Csurgó László, Dkfm. Peter Knerer
- **Headquarters:** 6728 Szeged, Napos út 3., Hungary
- **Phone:** +36 20 910 20 50
- **Email:** autotherm@autotherm.hu
- **Languages:** Hungarian, English, German, Romanian
- **Facility:** 1500 m², 4 production halls
- **Employees:** 33
- **Customers:** 3000+
- **Annual Conversions:** 280+
- **Cooling Partners:** Carrier Transicold, Daikin, Thermo King

## Products

- Refrigerated vans (hűtős furgon) — van isolation and cooling unit installation
- Cooled vehicle bodies (hűtőautó) — insulated box bodies for 3.5T chassis
- Deceased transport vehicles (elhunytszállító) — temperature-controlled funeral transport
- Commercial vehicle bodies (járműfelépítmény) — aluminium box, flatbed with tarpaulin
- Van isolations and cooling unit installation
- Vehicle body repair and service
